chat_log.content:
Looking at your profile, we're at the very beginning — I don't have anything about you yet except that you signed up as Bruce.

Before I can coach you on anything, I need to understand where you're actually coming from and what you're actually building. Not the pitch version — the honest one.

This will take about 30 minutes. The less polished your answers are, the more useful this will be.

Let's start with your background.

**What did you do before this?** Not the LinkedIn version — what did the work actually involve, and how long did you do it?
